wonders.effect: +1 output/worker/storage to every tier-4..6 building. Each General Assembly voted-boost target additionally gets +(UN level + 4) output.

wonders.effect: +1 output to every Science-producing building
wonders.name: Mount Tai

wonders.effect: +1 output/worker to every building consuming Water
wonders.name: Yangtze River

wonders.effect: +2 output (unstable) to every building unlocked in current age
wonders.name: Grand Canyon

wonders.effect: Output bonus to WW/Cold-War-age buildings, scales with tier distance

wonders.effect: +1 worker to every placed building with level ≥ 10
wonders.name: Temple of Heaven

wonders.effect: +5 worker to every under-construction building with level ≥ 20
wonders.name: Taj Mahal

wonders.effect: +10 worker to every incomplete world wonder
wonders.name: Neuschwanstein

wonders.effect: +(level+1) effective level to every Information Age GP this run (excl. level-boost GPs)
wonders.name: Large Hadron Collider

wonders.effect: +1 effective level to every Classical Age GP this run (also has under-construction worker bonus we don't model)
wonders.name: Aphrodite

wonders.effect: +wtoLevel output multiplier to every trade tile bonus's target building (stacks per tile)
wonders.name: World Trade Organization

wonders.effect: +wonderLevel level boost to every trade tile bonus's target building (Moomba festival adds +wonderLevel output too)
wonders.name: Great Ocean Road

wonders.effect: +2 level boost to every ally trade tile's target building (modelled here as +2 per trade tile since we don't track ally state)
wonders.name: Lake Louise

wonders.effect: Each listed building gets +N output multiplier where N = list length (manual stand-in for the in-game 2-tile production-chain effect)
wonders.name: Cathedral of Brasília

wonders.effect: Each user-selected building gets +1 level boost (×2 during Winter Carnival festival, which we don't model)
wonders.name: Chateau Frontenac

wonders.effect: Pick a Tradition (Cultivation / Commerce / Expansion / Honor). Each level unlocks one upgrade in that path; multipliers stack.
wonders.name: Chogha Zanbil

wonders.effect: Pick a Religion (Christianity / Islam / Buddhism / Polytheism). Each level unlocks one upgrade in that path. Also adds +1 sciencePerBusyWorker globally (not modelled — affects science income, not building output).
wonders.name: Luxor Temple

wonders.effect: Pick an Ideology (Liberalism / Conservatism / Socialism / Communism). Each level unlocks one upgrade in that path. Also adds +2 sciencePerBusyWorker globally (not modelled).
wonders.name: Big Ben

wonders.effect: +wonderLevel output/worker/storage to AI Lab; +InformationAge Wisdom adds +wisdom output/storage on top (happiness-based level boost not modelled)
wonders.name: Habitat 67

wonders.effect: Global +1 output during festival
wonders.name: Poseidon

wonders.effect: +5 output to ResearchFund during festival
wonders.name: Wall Street
